# terrible_cisco_dnac_authentication_policy_servers (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `accountingPort` (Number) Accounting port of RADIUS server. It is required for RADIUS server. The range is from 1 to 65535. E.g. 1813.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `authenticationPort` (Number) Authentication port of RADIUS server. It is required for RADIUS server. The range is from 1 to 65535. E.g. 1812.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `ciscoIseDtos` (String) Authentication Policy Servers's ciscoIseDtos.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `encryptionKey` (String) Encryption key used to encrypt shared secret.
- `encryptionScheme` (String) Type of encryption scheme for additional security.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `externalCiscoIseIpAddrDtos` (String) Authentication Policy Servers's externalCiscoIseIpAddrDtos.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `ipAddress` (String) IP address of authentication and policy server.
- `isIseEnabled` (Boolean) Value true for Cisco ISE Server. Default value is false.
- `messageKey` (String) Message key used to encrypt shared secret.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `port` (Number) Port of TACACS server. It is required for TACACS server. The range is from 1 to 65535.
- `protocol` (String) Type of protocol for authentication and policy server. If already saved with RADIUS, can update to RADIUS_TACACS. If already saved with TACACS, can update to RADIUS_TACACS.
- `pxgridEnabled` (Boolean) Value true for enable, false for disable. Default value is true.
- `retries` (String) Number of communication retries between devices and authentication and policy server. The range is from 1 to 3.
- `role` (String) Role of authentication and policy server. E.g. Primary, secondary.
- `sharedSecret` (String) Shared secret between devices and authentication and policy server.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `timeoutSeconds` (String) Number of seconds before timing out between devices and authentication and policy server. The range is from 2 to 20.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `useDnacCertForPxgrid` (Boolean) Value true to use Catalyst Center certificate for Pxgrid. Default value is false.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `dnac_response` (String) A dictionary or list with the response returned by the Cisco DNAC Python SDK
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
